title: Sales Inquiry — Enterprise Quote
description: Inbound sales prospect asking about enterprise pricing. Tests Sales Inquiry category, Sales routing, positive intent.
subject: Enterprise plan quote for 800 seats + SSO + audit logs
body:
Hello sales team,

I'm evaluating your platform for our organization, Northwind Partners. We are a financial services firm with ~800 employees and we're looking for an enterprise solution.

Our requirements:
- 800 seats
- SAML SSO (Okta)
- Audit logs (>= 12 months retention)
- Data residency in EU (Frankfurt)
- Custom contract / MSA
- DPA / GDPR

Could you send me a quote, your enterprise feature comparison, and availability for a 45-minute technical demo next week? Tuesday or Thursday afternoon CET works best.

Thanks,
Elena Volkov
Procurement Lead
Northwind Partners
github.com/evolkov-nw
